final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior scene illustration of a Nordic home living room (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "极简主义" Nordic aesthetic — references in the spirit of MUJI spatial design philosophy, Scandinavian 1970s functional interior tradition, Kinfolk magazine editorial photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a gray fabric sofa, green plants, and a floor lamp as key furnishing elements
Scene/backdrop: must include white walls, light wood-tone flooring, and a large window with sunlight streaming in
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, bright, warm and cozy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of white, light wood tones, soft gray, and natural green — exact ratios and values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a soft, natural surface treatment (fabric, wood grain, linen) — exact grain and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
